    BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon
    Adds broken-EOD-connector information to the personal-data export (issue #30).
    MyDataExportDeleteDefinition
    Delete the user's data from this database and export his data for later import into his personal database.
    hold_* tables are not exported they should rebuild with import mail* tables are not exported, they have a relation to others users TaskDataChange is not exported
